text:
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes 
COMMENT: 
There can be multiple records per CCW_APR_LINK_KEY. 
If no service location exists for the provider, the address from the practice location is used. Where no 
service or practice locations exist, the billing location is used.
